title: SpaceX IPO: The .5 Trillion Bet
description: SpaceX is targeting a .5 trillion IPO in 2026. Through a VC lens, we break down Starlink, Starship, the xAI merger, and whether it's actually cheap or genuinely overpriced. Meridian — Venture Science EP001
